# multicalci.com

> Free browser-based engineering calculators for process, chemical, mechanical, electrical, and civil engineers. All calculators implement recognised international engineering standards. No login, no subscription — runs entirely in the browser. Built and maintained by a practicing chemical engineer with experience across power/utilities, pharmaceutical, and petrochemical industries.

## Process Engineering Calculators

- [Orifice Flow Calculator](https://multicalci.com/orifice-flow-calculator/): ISO 5167-2 orifice plate sizing for liquids, steam, and gas. Calculates discharge coefficient (Reader-Harris/Gallagher equation), beta ratio, differential pressure, permanent pressure loss, and isentropic expansion factor. Supports corner taps, flange taps, and D&D/2 taps. SI and Imperial units.

- [Control Valve Sizing Calculator](https://multicalci.com/control-valve-sizing/): IEC 60534 / ISA 75.01 liquid and gas control valve sizing. Calculates Cv, Kv, pressure recovery factor FL, choked flow, cavitation index, and piping geometry factor Fp. Covers liquid, compressible gas, and steam service.

- [Pipe Pressure Drop Calculator](https://multicalci.com/pressure-drop-calculator/): Darcy-Weisbach equation with Colebrook-White friction factor for turbulent flow and Hagen-Poiseuille for laminar. 119-fluid library. Calculates friction losses, fitting losses (K-method), velocity head, and erosional velocity. SI and Imperial.

- [NPSH Calculator](https://multicalci.com/npsh-calculator/): Available NPSH (NPSHa) calculation for centrifugal pumps. Covers suction-side losses, vapour pressure correction, elevation head, and velocity head. 31 fluids. Cavitation check with NPSHr margin. SI and Imperial.

- [Vessel & Separator Sizing](https://multicalci.com/vessel-separator-sizing/): Gas-liquid separator sizing per API 12J and pressure vessel wall thickness per ASME Section VIII Division 1. Calculates shell thickness, nozzle reinforcement, and wind/seismic loads.

- [Heat Exchanger Design](https://multicalci.com/heat-exchanger-design/): Shell-and-tube heat exchanger thermal and hydraulic rating using the Bell-Delaware method. Calculates LMTD, NTU-effectiveness, overall heat transfer coefficient U, shellside and tubeside pressure drop, and fouling resistance. 80+ fluids. TEMA E/F/G/H/J/X shell types.

- [Cooling Tower Performance](https://multicalci.com/cooling-tower-performance/): Counterflow and crossflow cooling tower performance using the Merkel method and rigorous Poppe method. Calculates Merkel number (KaV/L), approach temperature, range, L/G ratio, fan power, and tower characteristic per CTI ATC-105. Altitude correction included.

- [Gas Equation of State](https://multicalci.com/gas-equation-of-state/): Real gas Z-factor and density using Peng-Robinson, Soave-Redlich-Kwong (SRK), and Van der Waals equations of state. Calculates compressibility factor, molar volume, and fugacity coefficient for pure gases and mixtures.

- [Psychrometric Calculator](https://multicalci.com/psychrometric-calculator/): Moist air properties — dew point, wet-bulb temperature, relative humidity, specific humidity, enthalpy, and specific volume. Altitude-corrected atmospheric pressure. SI and Imperial.

- [Water Treatment Calculator](https://multicalci.com/water-treatment-calculator/): Coagulant dosing, chlorine demand, and filtration design calculations for water treatment plant engineering.

## Steam / Power Engineering Calculators

- [Steam Properties Calculator](https://multicalci.com/steam-properties-calculator/): IAPWS-IF97 water and steam thermodynamic properties — specific enthalpy, entropy, specific volume, dynamic viscosity, thermal conductivity, and Prandtl number. All regions (liquid, two-phase, superheated, supercritical).

- [Steam Turbine Power Calculator](https://multicalci.com/steam-turbine-power-calculator/): Isentropic and actual turbine power, electrical output, condenser duty, and steam quality at exhaust. IAPWS-IF97 accuracy. Handles back-pressure and condensing turbines.

- [Rankine Cycle Calculator](https://multicalci.com/rankine-cycle-calculator/): Steam power plant thermal efficiency analysis — simple Rankine, reheat, and regenerative cycles. Calculates cycle efficiency, specific work, heat rate, and T-s diagram data using IAPWS-IF97.

- [Steam Quench Calculator](https://multicalci.com/steam-quench-calculator/): Desuperheater / quench water flow calculation for steam temperature control. Mass and energy balance with IAPWS-IF97 enthalpies.

## Fluid Machinery Calculators

- [Fluid Machinery Calculator](https://multicalci.com/fluid-machinery-calculator/): Pump NPSH, hydraulic power, compressor power (polytropic and isentropic), fan and blower sizing, affinity laws, and specific speed. Covers centrifugal pumps, reciprocating compressors, and axial/centrifugal fans.

## Mechanical Engineering Calculators

- [Mechanical Engineering Calculators](https://multicalci.com/mechanical-engineering-calculators/): Beam deflection, column buckling (Euler), stress analysis (von Mises), bolt torque-tension, flange bolt load (ASME B16.5), thermowell wake frequency (ASME PTC 19.3 TW), and more.

## Civil Engineering Calculators

- [Civil Engineering Calculators](https://multicalci.com/civil-engineering-calculators/): Structural beam analysis, reinforced concrete design (ACI 318), pile capacity, open channel flow (Manning equation), storm drainage, and foundation bearing capacity.

## Electrical Engineering Calculators

- [Electrical Engineering Calculators](https://multicalci.com/electrical-engineering-calculators/): Cable sizing, motor starting current, transformer sizing, power factor correction, short-circuit current (IEC 60909), and hazardous area classification.

## Instrumentation Calculators

- [Instrumentation Calculators](https://multicalci.com/instrumentation-calculators/): Thermowell wake frequency analysis (ASME PTC 19.3), control loop tuning (Ziegler-Nichols, Cohen-Coon), transmitter ranging, orifice impulse line sizing, and ISA 5.1 tag notation reference.

## Reference Libraries

- [Material Grades Library](https://multicalci.com/material-grades-library/): Engineering material grades with mechanical properties — carbon steel, stainless steel, duplex, alloy steel, aluminium, titanium. Cross-references ASTM, EN, JIS, and ISO designations.

- [Material of Construction Guide](https://multicalci.com/material-of-construction/): Corrosion resistance tables and material selection guide for process fluids — acids, alkalis, solvents, hydrocarbons, and gases.

## Unit Converters

- [Unit Converter](https://multicalci.com/unit-converter/): Engineering unit conversions for pressure, temperature, flow rate, viscosity, thermal conductivity, specific heat, density, energy, power, and more. 25+ engineering quantity categories.

## Standards Implemented

ISO 5167 (orifice/flow metering), IEC 60534 / ISA 75.01 (control valves), IAPWS-IF97 (steam/water properties), Bell-Delaware method (shell-and-tube heat exchangers), TEMA (heat exchanger construction), CTI ATC-105 / Merkel-Poppe (cooling towers), ASME Section VIII Div. 1 (pressure vessels), ASME B31.3 (process piping), ASME PTC 19.3 TW (thermowells), API 12J (separators), Peng-Robinson EOS, SRK EOS (gas properties), Darcy-Weisbach + Colebrook-White (pipe flow), ACI 318 (reinforced concrete), IEC 60909 (short-circuit current), ISA 5.1 (instrumentation symbology).
